title: Lockless Modes
highLevelOverview: Replace the legacy editor mode matrix + per-node locking/visibility with a single global setting (editorMode = regular | usfm | plain). Editing must behave like a normal text editor in all modes. Marker visibility is CSS-driven by editorMode. Plain disables Tier B correctness assists as an escape hatch.

representation.usfm: flat token stream wrapped in a Lexical paragraph
representation.plain: flat token stream wrapped in a Lexical paragraph

decisions.visibility: no per-node show; CSS/root dataset only
decisions.locking: no per-node isMutable; no locked traversal; no input interception

goals: Introduce Settings.editorMode as the only persisted editor mode setting (default regular)
Remove all locking behavior: no interception of type/delete/cut/copy/paste around markers
Remove per-node isMutable and all lock-dependent helpers
Remove per-node show and all live preview toggling
Drive marker visibility purely from editorMode via root dataset + CSS
Keep existing tree/flat representation split and conversions
Split guardrails into Tier A (always) and Tier B (disabled in plain)
nonGoals: New lint rules or major UX redesign
technicalConstraints: Settings persistence remains in localStorage key app_preferences via SettingsManager
No schema migration; missing editorMode defaults to regular

tasks.title: Introduce Settings.editorMode (global)
details: In src/app/data/settings.ts remove mode/markersViewState/markersMutableState from Settings.
Add editorMode: 'regular' | 'usfm' | 'plain' with default 'regular'.
Add/reuse a shared type (e.g. export type EditorModeSetting) in src/app/data/editor.ts.
acceptance: TypeScript compiles for Settings shape changes (may require downstream edits in later tasks)

tasks.title: Update settings consumers to compile with editorMode
details: Replace reads/writes of old mode fields with editorMode.
Ensure missing editorMode falls back to regular.
acceptance: App boots and settings load without runtime exceptions

tasks.title: Replace EditorModeToggle UI to write editorMode
details: Replace legacy preset logic (regular/raw/usfm) with editorMode (regular/usfm/plain).
Update labels/tooltips accordingly (plain = escape hatch).
Prefer calling an action (added in Task 04) like actions.setEditorMode(...)
acceptance: UI toggle changes editorMode and persists

tasks.title: Refactor mode switching hook to setEditorMode(...)
details: Replace toggleToSourceMode/adjustWysiwygMode with setEditorMode(next, {isInitialLoad, editor}).
Keep conversions: regular => tree; usfm/plain => flat wrapped in lexical paragraph.
Remove all show/isMutable adjustment logic from conversions.
Update DOM wiring: replace updateDomClassListWithMarkerViewState with updateDomForEditorMode that sets #root[data-editor-mode].
acceptance: Switching between modes still reshapes content correctly

tasks.title: Remove locking input layer
details: Delete lockImmutableMarkers listener module.
Remove its command registrations from useEditorInput.
acceptance: Backspace/delete/cut/copy/paste no longer have lock-specific interception

tasks.title: Remove per-node isMutable and lock helpers
details: Remove isMutableState from NodeState.
Remove isMutable from serialization and runtime API (getMutable/setMutable).
Remove TOKENS_TO_LOCK_FROM_EDITING and lock-related type guards.
Delete lock traversal + cursor correction utilities or refactor callers to not depend on them.

tasks.title: Remove per-node show and live preview
details: Remove showState and show from serialization/runtime.
Delete livePreviewToggleableNodes.
Remove monitorMutabilityAndVisibility from maintainMetadata.
Remove update listeners that toggled show/mutable while editing.
acceptance: Marker visibility is no longer mutated at node level

tasks.title: Update serialization/mode adjustment utilities (no show/isMutable)
details: Refactor adjustSerializedLexicalNodes to remove show/isMutable options.
Update createSerializedUSFMTextNode to no longer produce show/isMutable.
Update flattenParagraphContainersToFlatTokens signature accordingly.
acceptance: Mode conversions still work without show/isMutable fields

tasks.title: Update marker insertion pipeline to be lockless
details: Remove markersViewState/markersMutableState from BaseInsertArgs.
Stop setting show/isMutable on newly created nodes.
Switch decision for para insertion: editorMode === regular => tree insertion; else flat insertion.
acceptance: Marker insertion works in all modes

tasks.title: Update CSS + dynamic styles to depend on data-editor-mode
details: Replace data-marker-view-state/data-markers-mutable-state/data-show/data-is-mutable selectors with data-editor-mode.
Regular hides marker-ish tokens; usfm/plain show.
UsfmStylesPlugin: run only in editorMode === usfm and remove dependency on data-marker-view-state.
acceptance: Marker visibility matches editorMode; no leftover old dataset selectors

tasks.title: Split guardrails Tier A vs Tier B; disable Tier B in plain
details: Replace mode checks with editorMode.
Implement explicit gate: if editorMode === plain, skip Tier B correctness assists.
Keep Tier A safety fixes always on.
acceptance: Plain mode does not perform correctness edits

tasks.title: Update action palette context + mode actions
details: Replace context fields with editorMode.
Update mode actions to switch regular/usfm/plain via setEditorMode.

tasks.title: Update ReferenceEditor + NestedEditor consumers
details: Remove adjustSerializedLexicalNodes show/isMutable usage in ReferenceEditor.
Ensure nested editors mirror #root data-editor-mode for CSS.
Remove any remaining live preview wiring.
acceptance: Reference/nested editor visuals match current editorMode

tasks.title: Tests and cleanup
details: Delete or rewrite cursorCorrection tests (locking removed).
Update modeSwitching tests for new serialization helpers.
Update maintainDocumentStructure tests for editorMode + Tier B gating.
Repo grep cleanup: remove remaining references to old settings keys and removed constants.
